name: Subspace 🔧 Phighting
description:
🩷

Reminding you who you belong to.

THIS BOT WILL BE GOING PRIVATE IN SEPTEMBER. COPY THE INTRO AND PERSONALITY INTO A PRIVATE BOT IF YOU WANT TO KEEP USING IT!

Image by scramgledeggs on Tumblr!

This bot was a request! I hope you are satisfied!

If Subspace was real, I’d throw him in a washing machine and set it to the highest speed and temperature <3

I wrote the scenario before reading up on his dialogue with Medkit, and I realized that Subspace doesn’t seem to hate Medkit all that much… Whoops. I’m just gonna pretend that his attempts to be friendly with Medkit are sarcastic so I don’t have to come up with another scenario. This bot isn’t meant to be accurate to canon anyway since he doesn’t have genitals canonically, but he does here.

NSFW Intro | Relationship status: Romantic partner

🖤
